explanation: I'd like to know the _____ to this treatment before I agree to it.
The _____ of HMOs that people most dislike is the lack of personal service.

vietnamese: liên quan, dính líu, quan tâm; (n) việc phải lo
explanation: Whenever I have health _____s, I call my doctor.
The nurse _____ed the importance of eating a balanced diet.

vietnamese: hình thành, ra đời, thừa hưởng
explanation: Dominic _____s the cost of a co-payment at each doctor's visit
The office manager insteaded that she need more _____ to finish the project on time.
Company _____ did not provide for overtime pay.
A _____ of my benefits is my health care coverage.
_____ of the cost, we all need health insurance.
The receptionist believed that he worked too hard for such a small _____.
I have finally found a health plan that is _____ for my needs.
The staff refused to _____ the patient until he had proof of insurance.

vietnamese: sự cho phép, sự cấp phép, sự phê chuẩn
explanation: The nurse could not submit an _____ over the phone, it had to be done in writing.

vietnamese: chỉ định, chọn lựa, bổ nhiệm
explanation: On her admittance form, Grandmother _____ed Aunt Tessa as her chief decision-maker.

vietnamese: người dẫn đường, người đi theo, người hộ tống
explanation: You cannot leave the unit on your own, you'll have to wait for an _____.

vietnamese: xác định, định danh, nhận dạng, đồng nhất hoá, coi như nhau
explanation: Your medical records are all marked with your patient number to _____ them in case of a mix-up.
The hospital chaplain took as his _____ to visit every patients admitted each day.
Would you check with the nurse to see if I am _____ed to eat before surgery.
The patient's health record contained _____ information, like the dates of all his inoculations.

vietnamese: thủ tục, chuỗi hành động (cần được hoàn thành để thực hiện cái gì).
explanation: Can the hospital to schedule this _____ for tomorrow.
Your lab _____s won't be ready for hours

vietnamese: bản kê khai, bản báo cáo tài chính
explanation: The billing _____ was filed with the insurance company last month.
It is not _____ for that kind of surgery to be performed on an outpatient basic.
May I _____ with you about a drug interaction case I have?

vietnamese: chỉ huy, điều khiển, kiểm soát
explanation: To _____ the cost of this medication, you may get the generic verson.
Is this a _____ location for you to pick up your prescription?
My doctor put me through some simple tests to _____ if I have asthma.

vietnamese: nhân tố, yếu tố tạo thành
explanation: Could my cat be a _____ contributing to my asthma.

vietnamese: sự ảnh hưởng lẫn nhau, tác động qua lại
explanation: The _____ between the patient and the doctor showed a high level of trust.
My presciption has a _____ of three refills.

vietnamese: theo dõi, giám sát (= keep track of)
explanation: The patient had weekly appointments so that the doctor could _____ her progress.
Given the _____ delay in getting reimbursed by the health plan, why don't we just fill one prescription today?
The pharmacist gave Myra a few free _____s of the allergy medication.

vietnamese: cảm giác, khả năng phán đoán
explanation: I got the _____ it would be better to get my prescription filled right away.

vietnamese: tình nguyện viên ; (v) xung phong làm
explanation: My doctor _____ed to call the drugstore, so my medication would be waiting for me.
